archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - Modified for Industrial Premium

brand.name: Revanth Concrete Products
brand.vibe: Premium, modern, architectural, reliable, industrial yet luxurious.

typography.import_instruction: Import Cabinet Grotesk and Satoshi from Fontshare via CSS @import in index.css.

scale.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tight text-[#0F172A]

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Architectural grid with generous spacing. Mix brutalist functionality with premium glassmorphism overlays.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Use bento grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12) for visual interest.

glassmorphism_cards.classes: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border border-white/40 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] rounded-2xl
glassmorphism_cards.usage: Use for feature cards, product categories, and floating stat widgets over images.

buttons.primary: bg-[#EA580C] text-white hover:bg-[#C2410C] transition-colors rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-bold tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: backdrop-blur-md bg-white/50 border border-[#0F172A]/10 text-[#0F172A] hover:bg-white transition-colors rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-bold

navbar.style: Sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-[#0F172A]/5
navbar.elements: Logo left, Desktop links center, 'Get Quote' CTA right.

floating_whatsapp.style: Fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-lg hover:scale-110 transition-transform cursor-pointer

images.description: Concrete structure against blue sky, modern architecture
Modern concrete architecture with geometric shapes
Workers on a roof with a large crane overhead
Construction worker wearing a hard hat

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Do NOT use placeholder text for images. Use the exact URLs provided in this JSON.
Build out all pages (Home, About Us, Services, Products, Projects, Gallery, Careers, Contact Us) as single-page scroll or React Router setup depending on the boilerplate.
Create a Hero Banner with the 'hero_background' image. Use a 'Crystal Glass' card for the hero text box overlay to ensure readability.
Add Animated Counters using react-countup or framer-motion for statistics (Years, Projects, Products, Clients).
Design a 'Bento Grid' for Product Categories and Services.
Implement a 'Request Quotation' form and a standard Contact form using Shadcn UI.
Embed a Google Maps iframe in the Contact section.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, form inputs, and major sections.
Ensure hover animations on buttons, product cards, and nav links using Tailwind or Framer Motion.
Integrate Lucide React icons for Services and WhatsApp floating button.
